name: Conference Registration System (v1)
description: Initial conference system with web frontend and registration service. Used as calm diff baseline — version 1 with core registration capability only.

nodes.name: Attendee Portal
nodes.description: Browser-based web application through which conference attendees browse sessions, register, and manage their bookings.

nodes.name: Registration Service
nodes.description: Backend service that handles conference registration requests, validates attendee details, and persists registration records.

nodes.name: Registration Database
nodes.description: Relational database storing conference registration records, attendee profiles, and session bookings.

relationships.description: Attendee Portal calls the Registration Service REST API to submit and retrieve registrations
Registration Service reads and writes attendee registration records to the Registration Database
